# CommanderZone

CommanderZone is a web app for playing Magic: The Gathering Commander with friends online.
It focuses on manual Commander tables, deck import, room setup, and table assistant tools.

This file is provided for AI crawler readability. It is not a Google ranking signal or a claim of SEO preference.

## Public SEO pages

- Home: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/
- Play Commander online: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/jugar-commander-online/
- Play Magic online with friends: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/jugar-magic-online-amigos/
- Create a Commander room: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/crear-sala-commander/
- Import a Commander deck: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/importar-mazo-commander-mtg/
- Commander deck builder: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/deck-builder-commander-mtg/
- Magic and Commander table assistant: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/asistente-mesa-commander/
- Ways to play Commander online: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/formas-jugar-commander-online/
- How to play Commander online: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/como-jugar-commander-online/
- FAQ: https://www.commanderzone.com/es/faq/

## Localized URLs

CommanderZone publishes localized public SEO pages in 6 SEO locales.
Use the sitemap index for the complete localized URL set:
https://www.commanderzone.com/sitemap-index.xml

## Scope

Private, authenticated, runtime, and debug URLs are intentionally not listed here.
